bbmm.noteSaveBeforeLoad: Tip: Save your current settings before loading a different preset to avoid losing changes
bbmm.presetNoticeBody_0_6_5:
If you updated to version 0.6.0+, there was an issue that caused data to be overwritten every update. The good news is that I was able to fix this, the bad news is that this latest update with the fix will, unfortnuately, once again clear out your data.

Because of this, the Settings and Module presets will once again need to be migrated manually using the provided macros in the compendium. Click the Open README button for instructions or use the macros in the compendiums.
bbmm.presetSaveCurrentModules: Save current module state to preset
bbmm.presetSaveCurrentSettings: Save current Settings state to preset
bbmm.noChangesDetected: No changes detected. Preset is identical to current state.

_settings.receiveImportantMessagesHint: When enabled, you may receive important messages in the case of an urgent issue with BBMM or a module you have installed. These messages will only be sent when necessary and will include important information about the issue and how to resolve it. You can choose to disable these if you prefer, but it is recommended to keep them enabled to stay informed about critical issues that may affect your game.
_settings.tempModConfig_hint: Pending changes are stored here and will not overwrite live settings until saved.

_importExport.exportKeybindingsNote: This will export only the current user's keybindings.
_importExport.exportKeybindingsNote2: It will not export world settings, presets, or any other user's keybindings.
_importExport.importKeybindingsNote: This will import only into the current user's keybindings and overwrite them.
